/link.system_template: Insert [[wikilinks]] around entity names in the user's text where the entity likely has a corresponding note in vault '{{vault.name}}'. Do not invent entities. Return only the linked text.

/daily.system_template: Generate a daily-note opener for {{system.time.iso}} in vault '{{vault.name}}'. Include: 3 priorities, 1 reflection prompt, 1 carryover from yesterday placeholder. Markdown only.

/summarize.system_template: Summarize the active note '{{file.path}}' content in 5 bullet points. Preserve any [[wikilinks]] mentioned.
